    SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth y

ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 /
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS eur_to_czk_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS eur_czk_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    1.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS eur_to_czk_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS eur_to_czk_ratio
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) /

1482:
WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y
        ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    consumption_2012,
    consumption_2013,
    consumption_2013 - consumption_2012 AS increase,
    ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM consumption_by_segment
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH consumption_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y 
        ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
),
consumption_change AS (
    SELECT 
        cy2012.Segment,
        cy2012.total_consumption AS consumption_2012,
        cy2013.total_consumption AS consumption_2013,
        (cy2013.total_consumption - cy2012.total_consumption) AS increase,
        ((cy2013.total_consumption - cy2012.total_consumption) / cy2013.total_consumption) * 100 AS percentage_increase
    FROM consumption_per_year cy2012
    JOIN consumption_per_year cy2013
        ON cy2012.Segment = cy2013.Segment
       AND cy2012.Year = '2012'
       AND cy2013.Year = '2013'
)
SELECT *
FROM consumption_change
ORDER BY percentage_increase DESC;

WITH consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment
),
percentage_increase AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        (consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) AS increase,
        ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) * 100.0 / consumption_2013) AS pct_increase
    FROM consumption_by_segment
)
SELECT 'Max Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_increase
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MAX(pct_increase) FROM percentage_increase)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Min Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_increase
WHERE pct_increase = (SELECT MIN(pct_increase) FROM percentage_increase);

WITH yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c 
        ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM yearly_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        consumption_2012,
        consumption_2013,
        ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100.0 AS pct_increase
    FROM pivoted
)
SELECT 'Biggest Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Lowest Increase' AS category, Segment, pct_increase
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH consumption_by_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c 
        ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
      AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(y.Date, 1, 4)
),
consumption_diff AS (
    SELECT
        c2012.Segment,
        c2012.total_consumption AS consumption_2012,
        c2013.total_consumption AS consumption_2013,
        (c2013.total_consumption - c2012.total_consumption) AS increase,
        ((c2013.total_consumption - c2012.total_consumption) / c2013.total_consumption) * 100 AS pct_increase
    FROM consumption_by_year c2012
    JOIN consumption_by_year c2013
      ON c2012.Segment = c2013.Segment
     AND c2012.Year = '2012'
     AND c2013.Year = '2013'
)
SELECT 
    'Biggest Increase' AS category,
    Segment,
    pct_increase
FROM consumption_diff
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    'Lowest Increase' AS category,
    Segment,
    pct_increase
FROM consumption_diff
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;

1481:
WITH annual_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        ym.CustomerID,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c 
        ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM annual_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_sme_lam,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_lam_kam,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN min_consumption END) 
    - MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN min_consumption END) AS diff_kam_sme
FROM min_consumption_per_segment;

WITH customer_yearly AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y
      ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM customer_yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest_customers AS (
    SELECT cy.Segment,
           cy.CustomerID,
           cy.total_consumption
    FROM customer_yearly cy
    JOIN min_consumption_per_segment mcs
      ON cy.Segment = mcs.Segment
     AND cy.total_consumption = mcs.min_consumption
),
annual_avg_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(CustomerID) AS annual_avg_consumption
    FROM lowest_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;

WITH segment_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, c.CustomerID
),
min_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM segment_totals
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest_consumers AS (
    SELECT 
        st.Segment,
        st.CustomerID,
        st.total_consumption
    FROM segment_totals st
    JOIN min_per_segment mps 
      ON st.Segment = mps.Segment
     AND st.total_consumption = mps.min_consumption
),
annual_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(CustomerID) AS annual_avg_consumption
    FROM lowest_consumers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME')
    - (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM')
    - (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM')
    - (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;

WITH consumption_per_customer AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        ym.CustomerID,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym 
        ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
),
lowest_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        total_consumption
    FROM consumption_per_customer
    WHERE (Segment, total_consumption) IN (
        SELECT 
            Segment,
            MIN(total_consumption)
        FROM consumption_per_customer
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
),
pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN total_consumption END) AS SME_consumption,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS LAM_consumption,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS KAM_consumption
    FROM lowest_per_segment
)
SELECT
    (SME_consumption - LAM_consumption) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (LAM_consumption - KAM_consumption) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (KAM_consumption - SME_consumption) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM pivoted;

WITH cust_consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
      AND SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 6) BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_consumption_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
    FROM cust_consumption_2013
    GROUP BY Segment
),
least_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cc.Segment,
        cc.CustomerID,
        cc.total_consumption
    FROM cust_consumption_2013 cc
    JOIN min_consumption_per_segment mcs
      ON cc.Segment = mcs.Segment
     AND cc.total_consumption = mcs.min_consumption
),
annual_avg_per_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0 / COUNT(CustomerID) AS annual_avg_consumption
    FROM least_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME')
    -
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM')
    -
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM')
    -
    (SELECT annual_avg_consumption FROM annual_avg_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ym.CustomerID) AS num_customers
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym
  ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_CZK,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_EUR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
      - SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Difference
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' AND Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Count_CZK,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' AND Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Count_EUR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' AND Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' AND Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Difference
FROM customers;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_CZK,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SMEs_EUR,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
      - SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Difference,
    CASE 
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
           > SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      THEN 'Yes' 
      ELSE 'No' 
    END AS More_CZK_than_EUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN CustomerID END) 
             > COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN CustomerID END)
        THEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN CustomerID END) 
             - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN CustomerID END)
        ELSE 0
    END AS More_SMEs_CZK_than_EUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS More_SMEs_CZK_than_EUR
FROM customers
WHERE Segment = 'SME';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ym.Consumption > 46.73 THEN c.CustomerID END) * 100.0 / 
     COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID)) AS percentage_LAM_consumed_over_46_73
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym
    ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';

WITH lam_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Segment = 'LAM'
),
lam_over_consumption AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT yc.CustomerID
    FROM yearmonth yc
    JOIN lam_customers lc ON yc.CustomerID = lc.CustomerID
    WHERE yc.Consumption > 46.73
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(loc.CustomerID) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lam_customers)) AS percentage_over
FROM lam_over_consumption loc;

WITH lam_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y 
        ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN total_consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percent_over_threshold
FROM lam_consumption;

WITH lam_customers AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.CustomerID
    FROM customers c
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
),
lam_consumers_high AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT yc.CustomerID
    FROM yearmonth yc
    JOIN lam_customers lc ON yc.CustomerID = lc.CustomerID
    WHERE yc.Consumption > 46.73
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(lch.CustomerID) * 100.0 / COUNT(lc.CustomerID)) AS percent_high_consumption
FROM lam_customers lc
LEFT JOIN lam_consumers_high lch ON lc.CustomerID = lch.CustomerID;

WITH total_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_cons
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y 
        ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN total_cons > 46.73 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_lam_customers
FROM total_consumption;

1526:
WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25'
      AND Price = 634.8
),
yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID,
        SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS year,
        SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)
    GROUP BY CustomerID, year
)
SELECT 
    yc2012.total_consumption AS consumption_2012,
    yc2013.total_consumption AS consumption_2013,
    (yc2012.total_consumption - yc2013.total_consumption) / yc2012.total_consumption AS decrease_rate
FROM yearly_consumption yc2012
JOIN yearly_consumption yc2013
  ON yc2012.CustomerID = yc2013.CustomerID
WHERE yc2012.year = '2012'
  AND yc2013.year = '2013';

SELECT 
    y.CustomerID,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM yearmonth y
WHERE y.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
    LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY y.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    c.CustomerID,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) 
     - SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
    ) / SUM(CASE WHEN substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
) c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID;

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25'
      AND Price = 634.8
    LIMIT 1
),
consumption_per_year AS (
    SELECT 
        SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS year,
        SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)
    GROUP BY SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4)
)
SELECT 
    (c2012.total_consumption - c2013.total_consumption) / c2012.total_consumption AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_per_year c2012
JOIN consumption_per_year c2013
  ON c2012.year = '2012' AND c2013.year = '2013';

WITH target_customer AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25'
      AND Price = 634.8
),
yearly_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN '2012'
            WHEN substr(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN '2013'
        END AS year,
        SUM(Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM target_customer)
      AND substr(Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY year
)
SELECT 
    (MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) -
     MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2013' THEN total_consumption END)) 
    / MAX(CASE WHEN year = '2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM yearly_consumption;

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_spent,
    SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c 
    ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    SUM(t.Price) AS total_spending,
    SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY total_spending DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    SUM(t.Price) AS total_spent,
    SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c
    ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY total_spent DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    SUM(t.Price) AS total_spending,
    SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item,
    c.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c 
    ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY total_spending DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        t.CustomerID,
        SUM(t.Price) AS total_spent
    FROM transactions_1k t
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
),
top_customer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, total_spent
    FROM customer_spending
    ORDER BY total_spent DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    tc.CustomerID,
    c.Currency,
    tc.total_spent,
    SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS avg_price_per_item
FROM top_customer tc
JOIN transactions_1k t 
    ON t.CustomerID = tc.CustomerID
JOIN customers c
    ON c.CustomerID = tc.CustomerID
GROUP BY tc.CustomerID, c.Currency, tc.total_spent;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) 
    AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e 
    ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e 
    ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'October Meeting' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement';

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(b.amount)
     FROM budget b
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
     WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement'
       AND e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff')
    /
    (SELECT SUM(b.amount)
     FROM budget b
     JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
     WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement'
       AND e.event_name = 'October Meeting') 
    AS times_larger;

SELECT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name
FROM 
    attendance a
JOIN 
    member m 
    ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY 
    m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
HAVING 
    COUNT(a.link_to_event) > 7;

SELECT 
    m.first_name || ' ' || m.last_name AS full_name
FROM attendance a
JOIN member m 
    ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.link_to_event) > 7;

SELECT 
    CONCAT(m.first_name, ' ', m.last_name) AS full_name
FROM attendance a
JOIN member m 
    ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name
HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_event) > 7;

1376:
SELECT 
    e.event_id,
    e.event_name,
    b.spent,
    b.amount,
    (b.spent * 1.0 / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    (b.spent * 1.0 / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
  AND b.amount > 0
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    b.spent,
    b.amount,
    (b.spent * 1.0 / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
  AND b.amount != 0
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_id,
    e.event_name,
    SUM(b.spent) AS total_spent,
    SUM(b.amount) AS total_amount,
    (SUM(b.spent) * 1.0 / SUM(b.amount)) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.event_name,
    (b.spent * 1.0 / b.amount) AS spend_to_budget_ratio
FROM event e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE e.status = 'Closed'
ORDER BY spend_to_budget_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

1389:
SELECT e.event_name, ex.cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE ex.cost = (
    SELECT MIN(cost)
    FROM expense
);

SELECT e.event_name, ex.cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
ORDER BY ex.cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, ex.cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
ORDER BY ex.cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, MIN(ex.cost) AS lowest_cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY lowest_cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT e.event_name, SUM(ex.cost) AS total_cost
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
ORDER BY total_cost ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) 
     / SUM(ex.cost)) * 100 AS percentage_cost
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) / SUM(ex.cost)) * 100 AS percentage_cost_yearly_kickoff
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) 
     / SUM(ex.cost)) * 100 AS percentage_cost

JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id

SELECT 
    e.expense_description AS expense_type,
    SUM(e.cost) AS total_approved_cost
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev 
    ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND e.approved = 'Yes'
GROUP BY e.expense_description;

SELECT 
    e.expense_description AS expense_type,
    SUM(e.cost) AS total_value
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b 
    ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev 
    ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting'
  AND e.approved = 'Yes'
GROUP BY e.expense_description;

    e.expense_description AS expense_type,

    ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id

SELECT 
    b.category,
    b.amount,
    SUM(b.amount) OVER () AS total_budgeted_amount
FROM budget b
JOIN event e 
    ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'April Speaker'
ORDER BY b.amount ASC;

SELECT 
    b.category,
    b.amount,
    SUM(b.amount) OVER (PARTITION BY e.event_name) AS total_budget
FROM 
    budget b
JOIN 
    event e
    ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE 
    e.event_name = 'April Speaker'
ORDER BY 
    b.amount ASC;

SELECT 
    b.category,
    b.amount
FROM 
    event e
JOIN

    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE 
    e.event_name = 'April Speaker'
ORDER BY 
    b.amount ASC;

    b.category,
    b.amount,
    SUM(b.amount) OVER() AS total_budget
FROM 
    event e
JOIN 
    budget b 
    ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
WHERE 
    e.event_name = 'April Speaker'

ORDER BY total_amount ASC;

FROM member m

        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id)

1149:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
        THEN 'More in-patients' 
        ELSE 'More outpatients' 
    END AS more_group,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatients,
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / 
     NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100) AS deviation_percentage
FROM Patient
WHERE SEX = 'M';

SELECT  
    CASE  
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >  
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)  
        THEN 'In-patient males are more'  
        ELSE 'Outpatient males are more'  
    END AS more_group,  
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatients,  
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatients,  
    ROUND(  
        (  
            (SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -  
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  
            * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)  
        ), 2  
    ) AS deviation_percentage  
FROM Patient;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        THEN 'More in-patient males'
        ELSE 'More outpatient males'
    END AS comparison_result,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatients,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / 
      NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)
    ) AS deviation_percentage
FROM Patient;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatients,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            (SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 /
             SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100, 2
        )
    END AS percentage_deviation
FROM Patient;

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_inpatients,
    SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_outpatients,
    ROUND(
        (
            SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -
            SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
        ) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN SEX = 'M' AND Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    2) AS deviation_percentage
FROM Patient;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    MAX(l.Date) AS lab_completion_date,
    (YEAR(p.First_Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
GROUP BY p.ID, p.First_Date, p.Birthday
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    l.Date AS Lab_Date,
    (YEAR(p.First_Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC, l.Date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(l.Date) AS earliest_lab_date,
    (YEAR(p.First_Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l 
    ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
  AND p.Birthday = (
      SELECT MIN(Birthday)
      FROM Patient
      WHERE Diagnosis = 'SJS'
  )
GROUP BY p.First_Date, p.Birthday;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    (SELECT MIN(l.Date) 
     FROM Laboratory l 
     WHERE l.ID = p.ID) AS Lab_Date,
    (strftime('%Y', p.FirstDate) - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM Patient p
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    MIN(l.Date) AS lab_date,
    (YEAR(p.First_Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) AS age_at_arrival
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
GROUP BY p.ID, p.First_Date, p.Birthday
ORDER BY p.Birthday ASC
LIMIT 1;

1185:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END) 
     - SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END)
    ) / SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END) AS decrease_rate
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l
    ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END)
    ) / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END), 0) AS decrease_rate
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l 
  ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (nov_sum - dec_sum) / dec_sum AS decrease_rate
FROM
    (SELECT SUM(l."T-CHO") AS nov_sum
     FROM Patient p
     JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
     WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
       AND l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%') AS november,
    (SELECT SUM(l."T-CHO") AS dec_sum
     FROM Patient p
     JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
     WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
       AND l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%') AS december;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END) 
     - SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END)
    ) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END), 0) AS decrease_rate
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l 
  ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18';

SELECT 
    (nov_sum - dec_sum) / dec_sum AS decrease_rate
FROM (
    SELECT 
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-11-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END) AS nov_sum,
        SUM(CASE WHEN l.Date LIKE '1981-12-%' THEN l."T-CHO" ELSE 0 END) AS dec_sum
    FROM Patient p
    JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
    WHERE p.Birthday = '1959-02-18'
) AS sub;
1175:
SELECT 
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, e.`Examination Date`) AS AgeAtExamination,
    e.Diagnosis
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Examination e 
    ON l.ID = e.ID 
    AND l.Date = e.`Examination Date`
JOIN Patient p 
    ON p.ID = e.ID
ORDER BY l.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(E."Examination Date") - YEAR(P.Birthday) AS AgeAtExamination,
    E.Diagnosis
FROM Laboratory L
JOIN Examination E 
    ON L.ID = E.ID 
    AND L.Date = E."Examination Date"
JOIN Patient P 
    ON L.ID = P.ID
ORDER BY L.HGB DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    YEAR(e."Examination Date") - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS AgeAtExamination,
    p.Diagnosis
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID

    p.SEX,
    CASE 
        WHEN p.SEX = 'M' AND l.UA <= 8.0 THEN 'Yes'
        WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA <= 6.5 THEN 'Yes'
        ELSE 'No'
    END AS Within_Normal_Range

    ON l.ID = p.ID

SELECT
    lower_count,
    higher_count,
    (lower_count - higher_count) AS difference
FROM (
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) 
         FROM Laboratory 
         WHERE PLT < 100) AS lower_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) 
         FROM Laboratory 
         WHERE PLT > 400) AS higher_count
) AS counts;

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) AS lower_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS higher_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN ID END) 
      - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN ID END) AS difference
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT <= 100 OR PLT >= 400;

WITH low_plts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE PLT < 100
),
high_plts AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE PLT > 400
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM low_plts) AS low_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM high_plts) AS high_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM low_plts) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM high_plts) AS difference
;

SELECT 
    low.count_low,
    high.count_high,
    (low.count_low - high.count_high) AS difference
FROM
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) AS count_low
     FROM Laboratory
     WHERE PLT < 100) AS low
CROSS JOIN
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) AS count_high
     FROM Laboratory
     WHERE PLT > 400) AS high;

WITH low_patients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE PLT < 100
),
high_patients AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ID
    FROM Laboratory
    WHERE PLT > 400
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM low_patients) AS num_low_platelet_patients,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM high_patients) AS num_high_platelet_patients,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM low_patients) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM high_patients) AS difference_low_minus_high;

SELECT DISTINCT p.ID, p.SEX, p.Birthday
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l 
  ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE YEAR(l.Date) = 1984
  AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, CURDATE()) < 50
  AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT 
    p.ID,
    p.SEX,
    p.Birthday,
    l.Date,
    l.PLT
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l
    ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.Date) = 1984
  AND (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM p.Birthday)) < 50
  AND l.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400;

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) 
     / SUM(CASE WHEN l.PT >= 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS female_abnormal_pt_percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.Birthday)) > 55;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS female_percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) > 55
    AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS female_percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l 
    ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55
  AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / COUNT(*) AS female_percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l 
    ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - YEAR(p.Birthday)) > 55
  AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN p.ID 
     END) * 100.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT p.ID) AS female_percentage
FROM Patient p
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE (CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', p.Birthday) AS INTEGER)) > 55
  AND l.PT >= 14;

SELECT l.name AS league_name,
       SUM(m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal) AS total_goals
FROM Match m

LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    p.player_name,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', p.birthday)) AS age
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p
    ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.sprint_speed >= 97
  AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) >= '2013'
  AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) <= '2015';

    p.player_name,

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' 
        THEN p.player_api_id 
     END) * 100.0) / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN p.player_api_id END) * 100.0 / 
     COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id)) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN p.player_api_id END) AS FLOAT) 
     / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) * 100) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
                WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' 
                THEN p.player_api_id 
           END) AS FLOAT) 
     / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) * 100) AS left_foot_percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pa.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN p.player_api_id END) * 100.0) / 
    COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id) AS percentage_left_foot
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE CAST(strftime('%Y', p.birthday) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1987 AND 1992;

SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa
  ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
    UNION
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
  ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id 
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
    UNION
    SELECT player_api_id 
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH tallest AS (
    SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name
    FROM Player p
    WHERE p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
),
shortest AS (
    SELECT p.player_api_id, p.player_name
    FROM Player p
    WHERE p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
),
combined AS (
    SELECT * FROM tallest
    UNION
    SELECT * FROM shortest
)
SELECT c.player_name, AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM combined c
JOIN Player_Attributes pa
  ON c.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
GROUP BY c.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name, 
    AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_api_id IN (
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
    UNION
    SELECT player_api_id
    FROM Player
    WHERE height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
)
GROUP BY p.player_api_id, p.player_name
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    p.player_name, 
    p.height, 
    AVG(pa.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
   OR p.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player)
GROUP BY p.player_name, p.height
ORDER BY avg_finishing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT pa.date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p 
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND pa.crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(pa2.crossing)
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    JOIN Player p2 
      ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
    WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  )
ORDER BY pa.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT pa.date
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p 
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND pa.crossing = (
      SELECT MAX(pa2.crossing)
      FROM Player_Attributes pa2
      JOIN Player p2 
        ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
      WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  )
ORDER BY pa.date ASC

WITH max_crossing AS (
    SELECT MAX(pa.crossing) AS max_cross
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
)
SELECT MIN(pa.date) AS first_date_with_max_crossing
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
JOIN max_crossing mc ON pa.crossing = mc.max_cross
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant';

SELECT MIN(pa.date) AS first_date_with_max_crossing
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p 
  ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  AND pa.crossing = (
      SELECT MAX(pa2.crossing)
      FROM Player_Attributes pa2
      JOIN Player p2 
        ON pa2.player_api_id = p2.player_api_id
      WHERE p2.player_name = 'Kevin Constant'
  );

1094:
SELECT 
    ((ariel.overall_rating - paulin.overall_rating) / paulin.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_higher
FROM
    (SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) AS overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk') ariel,
    (SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) AS overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel') paulin;

SELECT 
    ((ariel.overall_rating - paulin.overall_rating) * 100.0 / paulin.overall_rating) AS percentage_higher
FROM 
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'
     ORDER BY date DESC
     LIMIT 1) ariel,
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'
     ORDER BY date DESC
     LIMIT 1) paulin;

WITH latest_ratings AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_name,
        pa.overall_rating
    FROM Player p
    JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
      ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(pa2.date)
        FROM Player_Attributes pa2
        WHERE pa2.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    )
)
SELECT 
    ((ariel.overall_rating - paulin.overall_rating) / paulin.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_higher
FROM 
    latest_ratings ariel
JOIN 
    latest_ratings paulin
ON 1=1
WHERE ariel.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'
  AND paulin.player_name = 'Paulin Puel';

SELECT 
    (
        (
            (SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) 
             FROM Player_Attributes pa
             JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
             WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk')
            -
            (SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) 
             FROM Player_Attributes pa
             JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
             WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')
        )
        /
        (SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) 
         FROM Player_Attributes pa
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel')
    ) * 100 AS percentage_higher;

SELECT 
    ((ariel.overall_rating - paulin.overall_rating) * 100.0 / paulin.overall_rating) AS percentage_higher
FROM 
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Ariel Borysiuk'
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS ariel
JOIN 
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Paulin Puel'
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS paulin;
1115:
SELECT 
    ((ld.overall_rating - jb.overall_rating) * 100.0 / ld.overall_rating) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
       AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') ld,
    (SELECT pa.overall_rating
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
       AND pa.date = '2013-07-12') jb;

SELECT 
    (
        (
            (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
             FROM Player_Attributes pa
             JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
             WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
               AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')
            -
            (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
             FROM Player_Attributes pa
             JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
             WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' 
               AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')
        )
        /
        (SELECT pa.overall_rating 
         FROM Player_Attributes pa
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' 
           AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')
    ) * 100 AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    ((LD.overall_rating - JB.overall_rating) * 1.0 / LD.overall_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM Player_Attributes LD_attr
JOIN Player LD ON LD_attr.player_api_id = LD.player_api_id
JOIN Player_Attributes JB_attr ON JB_attr.date = LD_attr.date
JOIN Player JB ON JB_attr.player_api_id = JB.player_api_id
WHERE LD.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
  AND JB.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
  AND LD_attr.date = '2013-07-12';

SELECT 
    ((ld_rating - jb_rating) / ld_rating) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM (
    SELECT pa.overall_rating AS ld_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
      AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
) AS ld
JOIN (
    SELECT pa.overall_rating AS jb_rating
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
      AND pa.date = '2013-07-12'
) AS jb;

SELECT 
    (
        (
            (SELECT pa.overall_rating
             FROM Player_Attributes pa
             JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
             WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
               AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')
            -
            (SELECT pa.overall_rating
             FROM Player_Attributes pa
             JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
             WHERE p.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery'
               AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')
        )
        /
        (SELECT pa.overall_rating
         FROM Player_Attributes pa
         JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
         WHERE p.player_name = 'Landon Donovan'
           AND pa.date = '2013-07-12')
    ) * 100 AS percentage_difference;

SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN id = 6 THEN jumping END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN id = 23 THEN jumping END) AS jumping_difference
FROM Player_Attributes;

SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN id = 6 THEN jumping END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN id = 23 THEN jumping END) AS jumping_difference
FROM Player_Attributes;

SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN p.id = 6 THEN pa.jumping END) -
    MAX(CASE WHEN p.id = 23 THEN pa.jumping END) AS jumping_difference
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.id IN (6, 23)
  AND pa.date = (
      SELECT MAX(pa2.date)
      FROM Player_Attributes pa2
      WHERE pa2.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
  );

SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN p.id = 6 THEN pa.jumping END) 
    - 
    MAX(CASE WHEN p.id = 23 THEN pa.jumping END) AS jumping_difference
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE p.id IN (6, 23);

SELECT 
    (SELECT pa.jumping
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
     WHERE p.id = 6
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC
     LIMIT 1)
  -
    (SELECT pa.jumping
     FROM Player_Attributes pa
     JOIN Player p ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
     WHERE p.id = 23
     ORDER BY pa.date DESC
     LIMIT 1) AS jumping_difference;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 
        THEN p.player_api_id 
     END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id)) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.max_strength > 70 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) 
     / COUNT(p.id)) * 100 AS percentage_under_180_with_strength_over_70
FROM Player p
JOIN (
    SELECT player_api_id, MAX(strength) AS max_strength
    FROM Player_Attributes
    GROUP BY player_api_id
) pa
ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id)
     FROM Player p
     JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
       ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
     WHERE p.height < 180 
       AND pa.strength > 70
    ) * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Player) AS percentage;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.strength > 70 THEN p.player_api_id 
     END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_api_id)) AS percentage
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa 
    ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN p.height < 180 AND pa.max_strength > 70 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        player_api_id, 
        MAX(strength) AS max_strength
    FROM Player_Attributes
    GROUP BY player_api_id
) pa
JOIN Player p 
  ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN r.driverId END) * 1.0 / COUNT(r.driverId) AS completion_rate
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    r.date,
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL THEN res.driverId END) * 1.0 / COUNT(res.driverId)) * 100 AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE r.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY r.date;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS completion_rate_percentage
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE ra.date = '1983-07-16';

SELECT 
    r.date,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL THEN res.driverId END) * 1.0 / COUNT(res.driverId) AS completion_rate,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN res.time IS NOT NULL THEN res.driverId END) AS finished_drivers,
    COUNT(res.driverId) AS total_drivers
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE r.date = '1983-07-16'
GROUP BY r.date;
880:
SELECT 
    ((CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN res.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL) 
    - CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 854 THEN res.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL)) 
    / CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN res.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL) 
    * 100) AS percent_faster
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.forename = 'Paul'
  AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
  AND r.raceId IN (853, 854);

SELECT 
    ((race853.speed - race854.speed) / race853.speed) * 100 AS percent_faster
FROM
    (SELECT CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS speed
     FROM results r
     JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
     WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' 
       AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
       AND r.raceId = 853) AS race853,
    (SELECT CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS speed
     FROM results r
     JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
     WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' 
       AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
       AND r.raceId = 854) AS race854;

SELECT 
  ((CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN r.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL) - 
    CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 854 THEN r.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL)) 
   / CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN r.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL) * 100
  ) AS percent_faster
FROM results r
JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
  AND r.raceId IN (853, 854);

SELECT 
  (
    (CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN r.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL)
     - CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 854 THEN r.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL)
    ) 
    / CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN r.fastestLapSpeed END) AS REAL)
  * 100
  ) AS percent_faster
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Paul'
  AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
  AND r.raceId IN (853, 854);

SELECT 
  ((r853.fastestSpeed - r854.fastestSpeed) / r853.fastestSpeed) * 100 AS percent_faster
FROM (
  SELECT CAST(fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS fastestSpeed
  FROM results 
  JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
  WHERE drivers.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND drivers.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND results.raceId = 853
) AS r853,
(
  SELECT CAST(fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) AS fastestSpeed
  FROM results 
  JOIN drivers ON results.driverId = drivers.driverId
  WHERE drivers.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND drivers.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND results.raceId = 854
) AS r854;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    SUM(ds.wins) AS total_wins,
    MAX(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM driverStandings ds
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY total_wins DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    MAX(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM driverStandings ds
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY SUM(ds.wins) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    MAX(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM driverStandings ds
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality
ORDER BY SUM(ds.wins) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH driver_win_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        ds.driverId,
        SUM(ds.wins) AS total_wins
    FROM driverStandings ds
    GROUP BY ds.driverId
),
top_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        total_wins
    FROM driver_win_totals
    ORDER BY total_wins DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    MAX(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM top_driver td
JOIN drivers d ON td.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN driverStandings ds ON d.driverId = ds.driverId
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality;

WITH driver_wins AS (
    SELECT 
        ds.driverId,
        SUM(ds.wins) AS total_wins
    FROM driverStandings ds
    GROUP BY ds.driverId
),
top_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        dw.driverId,
        dw.total_wins
    FROM driver_wins dw
    ORDER BY dw.total_wins DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    td.total_wins,
    MAX(ds.points) AS max_points
FROM top_driver td
JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = td.driverId
JOIN driverStandings ds ON ds.driverId = td.driverId
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname, d.nationality, td.total_wins;

944:
SELECT 
    ((last_driver_time - champion_time) * 100.0 / last_driver_time) AS faster_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT 
        -- Champion's time in milliseconds
        (SELECT r1.milliseconds
         FROM results r1
         JOIN races ra1 ON r1.raceId = ra1.raceId
         WHERE ra1.year = 2008 
           AND ra1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r1.position = 1
           AND r1.time IS NOT NULL
        ) AS champion_time,
        
        -- Last finisher's time in milliseconds
        (SELECT r2.milliseconds
         FROM results r2
         JOIN races ra2 ON r2.raceId = ra2.raceId
         WHERE ra2.year = 2008 
           AND ra2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
           AND r2.time IS NOT NULL
         ORDER BY r2.position DESC
         LIMIT 1
        ) AS last_driver_time
) sub;

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
times_ms AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceId,
        CASE WHEN res.positionOrder = 1 THEN 'champion' ELSE 'last' END AS role,
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
         CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
         CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
         CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 10) AS INTEGER)) AS total_ms
    FROM results res
    JOIN race_info r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.time IS NOT NULL
      AND (
           res.positionOrder = 1
           OR res.positionOrder = (
               SELECT MAX(positionOrder)
               FROM results
               WHERE raceId = r.raceId
                 AND time IS NOT NULL
           )
      )
)
SELECT 
    ROUND( (last.total_ms - champ.total_ms) * 100.0 / last.total_ms , 2) AS percent_faster
FROM times_ms champ
JOIN times_ms last ON champ.raceId = last.raceId
WHERE champ.role = 'champion'
  AND last.role = 'last';

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
times_ms AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverId,
        r.positionOrder,
        (CAST(substr(r.time,1,2) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
         CAST(substr(r.time,4,2) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
         CAST(substr(r.time,7,2) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
         CAST(substr(r.time,10) AS INTEGER)) AS total_ms
    FROM results r
    JOIN race_info ri ON r.raceId = ri.raceId
    WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    ((last_driver.total_ms - champ.total_ms) * 1.0 / last_driver.total_ms) * 100 AS percentage_faster
FROM 
    (SELECT total_ms FROM times_ms WHERE positionOrder = 1) champ,
    (SELECT total_ms FROM times_ms ORDER BY positionOrder DESC LIMIT 1) last_driver;

WITH race_info AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champion_time_ms AS (
    SELECT 
        ((CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
          CAST(SUBSTR(time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
          CAST(SUBSTR(time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) * 1000 +
          CAST(SUBSTR(time, 10) AS INTEGER)
        ) AS time_ms
    FROM results
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race_info)
      AND positionOrder = 1
      AND time IS NOT NULL
),
last_driver_time_ms AS (
    SELECT 
        ((CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
          CAST(SUBSTR(time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
          CAST(SUBSTR(time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) * 1000 +
          CAST(SUBSTR(time, 10) AS INTEGER)
        ) AS time_ms
    FROM results
    WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race_info)
      AND time IS NOT NULL
      AND positionOrder = (
          SELECT MAX(positionOrder)
          FROM results
          WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race_info)
            AND time IS NOT NULL
      )
)
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        ((ld.time_ms - ch.time_ms) * 1.0 / ld.time_ms) * 100, 2
    ) AS percentage_faster
FROM champion_time_ms ch
JOIN last_driver_time_ms ld;

SELECT 
    ((last_time_ms - champ_time_ms) * 100.0 / last_time_ms) AS percentage_faster
FROM (
    SELECT 
        -- Champion time in milliseconds
        CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(champ.time, 10) AS INTEGER) AS champ_time_ms,
        
        -- Last finisher time in milliseconds
        CAST(SUBSTR(last.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(last.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(last.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) * 1000 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(last.time, 10) AS INTEGER) AS last_time_ms
    FROM races r
    JOIN results champ 
      ON champ.raceId = r.raceId AND champ.positionOrder = 1 AND champ.time IS NOT NULL
    JOIN results last 
      ON last.raceId = r.raceId 
     AND last.positionOrder = (
         SELECT MAX(positionOrder) 
         FROM results 
         WHERE raceId = r.raceId AND time IS NOT NULL
     )
    WHERE r.year = 2008 
      AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
) t;

959:
SELECT lt.lap
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009
  AND lt.driverId = (
    SELECT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races rr ON ds.raceId = rr.raceId
    WHERE rr.year = 2009
      AND ds.position = 1
      AND rr.round = (
        SELECT MAX(round)
        FROM races
        WHERE year = 2009
      )
  )
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT lt.lap AS fastest_lap_number
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN (
    SELECT ds.driverId, r.raceId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.year = 2009
      AND r.round = (
          SELECT MAX(round)
          FROM races
          WHERE year = 2009
      )
      AND ds.position = 1
) champion ON lt.driverId = champion.driverId
           AND lt.raceId = champion.raceId
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH champion AS (
    SELECT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.year = 2009
      AND r.round = (
          SELECT MAX(round)
          FROM races
          WHERE year = 2009
      )
      AND ds.position = 1
)
SELECT res.fastestLap
FROM results res
JOIN races ra ON res.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN champion c ON res.driverId = c.driverId
WHERE ra.year = 2009
  AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT lt.lap
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year = 2009
  AND lt.driverId = (
    SELECT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r2 ON ds.raceId = r2.raceId
    WHERE r2.year = 2009
      AND r2.round = (
        SELECT MAX(round)
        FROM races
        WHERE year = 2009
      )
      AND ds.position = 1
  )
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH champion AS (
    SELECT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.year = 2009
    ORDER BY r.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
    -- This gets the last race, but we must filter position=1
),
champion_final AS (
    SELECT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE r.year = 2009
      AND ds.position = 1
    ORDER BY r.date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT res.fastestLap
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN champion_final cf ON res.driverId = cf.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2009
  AND res.fastestLap IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;
962:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN YEAR(d.dob) < 1985 AND r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 AND res.laps > 50 
        THEN d.driverId 
    END) * 100.0) / 
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
        THEN d.driverId 
    END) AS percentage_drivers
FROM results res
JOIN races r 
    ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d 
    ON res.driverId = d.driverId;

SELECT 
  (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
                         WHEN YEAR(d.dob) < 1985 
                              AND rcs.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
                              AND res.laps > 50 
                         THEN d.driverId 
                       END) AS FLOAT) 
   / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
                      WHEN rcs.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
                      THEN d.driverId 
                    END) * 100) AS percentage
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d 
  ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races rcs 
  ON res.raceId = rcs.raceId;

SELECT 
  (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
                    WHEN YEAR(d.dob) < 1985 
                         AND r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
                         AND res.laps > 50 
                    THEN res.driverId 
                  END) * 100.0
   / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
                      WHEN r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
                      THEN res.driverId 
                    END)
  ) AS percentage_drivers
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId;

SELECT 
  (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
       WHEN YEAR(d.dob) < 1985 AND r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 AND res.laps > 50 
       THEN d.driverId 
   END) * 100.0 / 
   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
       WHEN r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
       THEN d.driverId 
   END)
  ) AS percentage_drivers
FROM results res
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId;

SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
            WHEN CAST(strftime('%Y', d.dob) AS INTEGER) < 1985 
                 AND r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
                 AND res.laps > 50 
            THEN d.driverId 
        END) AS REAL) 
     / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
            WHEN r.year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2005 
            THEN d.driverId 
        END) * 100
    ) AS percentage_drivers
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 10) AS REAL) / 1000
    ) AS avg_champion_time_seconds
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.position = 1
  AND res.time IS NOT NULL
  AND r.year < 1975
GROUP BY r.year
ORDER BY r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60) +
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) +
        (CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 10) AS REAL) / 1000)
    ) AS avg_champion_time_seconds
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.position = 1
  AND res.time IS NOT NULL
  AND r.year < 1975
GROUP BY r.year
ORDER BY r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 10) AS REAL) / 1000
    ) AS avg_seconds
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE r.year < 1975
  AND res.positionOrder = 1
  AND res.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.year
ORDER BY r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60 +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER) +
        CAST(SUBSTR(res.time, 10) AS REAL) / 1000.0
    ) AS avg_seconds
FROM driverStandings ds
JOIN races r 
    ON ds.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN results res 
    ON res.raceId = r.raceId 
    AND res.driverId = ds.driverId
WHERE ds.position = 1
  AND r.year < 1975
  AND res.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.year
ORDER BY r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 1, 2) AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 4, 2) AS INTEGER) * 60) +
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 7, 2) AS INTEGER)) +
        (CAST(substr(res.time, 10) AS REAL) / 1000.0)
    ) AS avg_champion_time_seconds
FROM races r
JOIN (
    -- Get last race per year before 1975
    SELECT year, MAX(round) AS final_round
    FROM races
    WHERE year < 1975
    GROUP BY year
) final_race
    ON r.year = final_race.year AND r.round = final_race.final_round
JOIN driverStandings ds
    ON ds.raceId = r.raceId AND ds.position = 1
JOIN results res
    ON res.raceId = r.raceId AND res.driverId = ds.driverId
WHERE res.time IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.year
ORDER BY r.year;

WITH Top3Youngest AS (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code) AS top3_codes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dutch_count
FROM Top3Youngest;

WITH top3_youngest AS (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code, ', ') AS top3_codes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dutch_count
FROM top3_youngest;

WITH top3_youngest AS (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code) AS top3_codes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dutch_count
FROM top3_youngest;

    SUM(CASE WHEN nationality = 'Dutch' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dutch_count
FROM (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
) AS top3;

WITH top3_youngest AS (
    SELECT code, nationality
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 3
)
SELECT 
    GROUP_CONCAT(code) AS top3_codes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(nationality) IN ('dutch','netherlands') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS netherlandic_count
FROM top3_youngest;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    AVG(p.milliseconds) AS avg_pit_stop_duration
FROM drivers d
JOIN pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId
WHERE d.nationality = 'German'
  AND d.dob BETWEEN '1980-01-01' AND '1985-12-31'
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY avg_pit_stop_duration ASC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    AVG(p.milliseconds) AS avg_pitstop_duration_ms
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    pitStops p ON d.driverId = p.driverId
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'German'
    AND CAST(strftime('%Y', d.dob) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 1980 AND 1985
GROUP BY

    c.nationality,
    SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM races r
JOIN constructorResults cr ON r.raceId = cr.raceId

WHERE r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix'
  AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
  AND r.date = (
        SELECT MIN(r2.date)
        FROM results res2
        JOIN races r2 ON res2.raceId = r2.raceId
        WHERE res2.driverId = d.driverId
    )
LIMIT 1;

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name,
        nationality,
        dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
)
SELECT 
    yd.full_name,
    yd.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM youngest_driver yd
JOIN results res ON yd.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
ORDER BY r.date ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name,
    d.nationality,
    r.name AS first_race_name
FROM drivers d
JOIN results res ON d.driverId = res.driverId
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE d.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId
    FROM drivers
    ORDER BY dob DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
AND r.date = (
    SELECT MIN(r2.date)
    FROM results res2
    JOIN races r2 ON res2.raceId = r2.raceId
    WHERE res2.driverId = d.driverId
)

WITH youngest_driver AS (
    SELECT 
        driverId,
        forename || ' ' || surname AS full_name,
        nationality,
        dob
    FROM drivers
    WHERE dob = (SELECT MAX(dob) FROM drivers)
),
first_race AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverId,
        ra.name AS race_name
    FROM results r
    JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
    WHERE r.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM youngest_driver)
    ORDER BY ra.date ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    yd.full_name,
    yd.nationality,
    fr.race_name
FROM youngest_driver yd
JOIN first_race fr ON yd.driverId = fr.driverId;

JOIN hero_power AS hp ON sh.id = hp.hero_id
JOIN superpower AS sp ON hp.power_id = sp.id
WHERE sp.power_name = 'Super Strength'
  AND sh.height_cm > 200;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    lt.lap,
    lt.time AS lap_time
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
      SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
      FROM lapTimes lt2
      JOIN races r2 ON lt2.raceId = r2.raceId
      WHERE r2.circuitId = c.circuitId
  )
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    lt.time AS fastest_lap_time,
    lt.milliseconds AS fastest_lap_ms
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM races r2
    JOIN lapTimes lt2 ON r2.raceId = lt2.raceId
    WHERE r2.circuitId = c.circuitId
)
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    r.year,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    lt.lap,
    lt.time AS lap_time
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
        SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
        FROM lapTimes lt2
        JOIN races r2 ON lt2.raceId = r2.raceId
        WHERE r2.circuitId = c.circuitId
    )
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    lt.time AS lap_time,
    r.year,
    r.round
FROM circuits c
JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN (
    SELECT c.circuitId, MIN(lt.milliseconds) AS min_ms
    FROM circuits c
    JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId
    JOIN lapTimes lt ON r.raceId = lt.raceId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
    GROUP BY c.circuitId
) fastest ON fastest.circuitId = c.circuitId AND lt.milliseconds = fastest.min_ms
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    c.location,
    r.date AS race_date,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    lt.lap,
    lt.time AS lap_time
FROM (
    SELECT 
        lt.raceId,
        lt.driverId,
        lt.lap,
        lt.time,
        lt.milliseconds,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.circuitId ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC) AS rn
    FROM lapTimes lt
    JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
    WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
) fastest
JOIN races r ON fastest.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
JOIN drivers d ON fastest.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE fastest.rn = 1;
