SELECT DISTINCT d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS full_name
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN driverStandings ds 
  ON lt.raceId = ds.raceId 
 AND lt.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN drivers d 
  ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ds.position <= 20
  AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes
  );

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    JOIN driverStandings ds ON lt2.raceId = ds.raceId 
                           AND lt2.driverId = ds.driverId
    WHERE ds.position <= 20
);

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN drivers d ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE lt.driverId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ds.driverId
    FROM driverStandings ds
    WHERE ds.position <= 20
)
AND lt.milliseconds = (
    SELECT MIN(lt2.milliseconds)
    FROM lapTimes lt2
    WHERE lt2.driverId IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT ds2.driverId
        FROM driverStandings ds2
        WHERE ds2.position <= 20
    )
);

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN results r 
  ON lt.raceId = r.raceId 
  AND lt.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN drivers d 
  ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.positionOrder <= 20
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN driverStandings ds 
  ON lt.raceId = ds.raceId 
 AND lt.driverId = ds.driverId
JOIN drivers d 
  ON lt.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE ds.position <= 20
ORDER BY lt.milliseconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    ABS(
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN p.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    ) AS difference_in_superheroes
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
WHERE p.publisher_name IN ('DC Comics', 'Marvel Comics');

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS bad_percentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS bad_superheroes_percentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_superheroes_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(s.id)) AS bad_percentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) 
     / COUNT(*) * 100) AS bad_percentage,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS marvel_bad_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_bad_superheroes,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.alignment = 'Bad' AND p.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bad_superheroes_marvel_count
FROM superhero s
JOIN alignment a ON s.alignment_id = a.id
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id;

SELECT 
    eye_colour.colour AS eye_colour,
    hair_colour.colour AS hair_colour,
    skin_colour.colour AS skin_colour
FROM superhero
JOIN gender 
    ON superhero.gender_id = gender.id
JOIN publisher 
    ON superhero.publisher_id = publisher.id
JOIN colour AS eye_colour 
    ON superhero.eye_colour_id = eye_colour.id
JOIN colour AS hair_colour 
    ON superhero.hair_colour_id = hair_colour.id
JOIN colour AS skin_colour 
    ON superhero.skin_colour_id = skin_colour.id
WHERE gender.gender = 'Female'
  AND publisher.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics';

JOIN colour AS eye

SELECT 
    CAST(post_count AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(vote_count, 0) AS posts_to_votes_ratio
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE OwnerUserId = 24) AS post_count,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM votes WHERE UserId = 24) AS vote_count
) AS counts;

SELECT 
    CAST(p.post_count AS FLOAT) / CAST(v.vote_count AS FLOAT) AS posts_to_votes_ratio
FROM 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS post_count 
     FROM posts 
     WHERE OwnerUserId = 24) p,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS vote_count 
     FROM votes

    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS vote_count 
     FROM votes 
     WHERE UserId = 24) v;

) p
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS vote_count
    FROM votes
    WHERE UserId = 24
) v;

SELECT c.Text
FROM comments c
JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
  AND c.UserId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory ph
    WHERE ph.PostId = p.Id
      AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL
  );

SELECT c.*
FROM comments c
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory ph
    JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
      AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL
);

SELECT c.*
FROM comments AS c
JOIN postHistory AS ph
  ON c.UserId = ph.UserId
JOIN posts AS p
  ON ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?';

SELECT c.Text,
       c.CreationDate,
       u.DisplayName
FROM comments c
JOIN users u
  ON c.UserId = u.Id
JOIN posts p
  ON c.PostId = p.Id
JOIN postHistory ph
  ON ph.UserId = u.Id
  AND ph.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?';

SELECT c.*
FROM comments AS c
WHERE c.UserId IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT ph.UserId
    FROM postHistory AS ph
    JOIN posts AS p
      ON ph.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.Title = 'Why square the difference instead of taking the absolute value in standard deviation?'
      AND ph.UserId IS NOT NULL
);
595:
SELECT DISTINCT u.Id, u.DisplayName, u.Views
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT ph.UserId, ph.PostId
    FROM postHistory ph
    GROUP BY ph.UserId, ph.PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) AS one_history
    ON u.Id = one_history.UserId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000;

SELECT DISTINCT u.Id, u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT ph.UserId, ph.PostId
    FROM postHistory ph
    JOIN posts p ON ph.PostId = p.Id
    WHERE p.ViewCount >= 1000
    GROUP BY ph.UserId, ph.PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) AS filtered_ph
ON u.Id = filtered_ph.UserId;

SELECT u.Id AS UserId,
       u.DisplayName
FROM users u
JOIN posts p 
  ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
JOIN (
    SELECT ph.PostId
    FROM postHistory ph
    GROUP BY ph.PostId
    HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
) single_history
  ON p.Id = single_history.PostId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName
HAVING COUNT(p.Id) = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM posts p2
    WHERE p2.OwnerUserId = u.Id
);

SELECT u.Id, u.DisplayName, u.Views
FROM users u
JOIN (
    SELECT ph.UserId
    FROM (
        SELECT UserId, PostId, COUNT(*) AS cnt
        FROM postHistory
        GROUP BY UserId, PostId
    ) t
    GROUP BY t.UserId
    HAVING MAX(t.cnt) = 1
) single_hist ON u.Id = single_hist.UserId
WHERE u.Views >= 1000;

SELECT u.Id AS UserId,
       u.DisplayName,
       u.Views
FROM users u
JOIN posts p ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT ph.PostId
    FROM postHistory ph
    GROUP BY ph.PostId
    HAVING COUNT(ph.Id) = 1
) one_hist ON one_hist.PostId = p.Id
GROUP BY u.Id, u.DisplayName, u.Views
HAVING COUNT(p.Id) = COUNT(one_hist.PostId)
   AND u.Views >= 1000;

) AS filtered_users;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_users
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING SUM(p.FavoriteCount) >= 4
) AS qualified_users;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS qualifying_users
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id
    FROM users u
    JOIN posts p ON u.Id = p.OwnerUserId
    WHERE u.Location = 'United Kingdom'
    GROUP BY u.Id
    HAVING SUM(COALESCE(p.FavoriteCount, 0)) >= 4
) AS sub;

WITH influential_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM posts
    WHERE OwnerUserId = (SELECT Id FROM influential_user)
)
SELECT 
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_above_50
FROM user_posts;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) AS percentage_above_50
FROM posts p
WHERE p.OwnerUserId = (
    SELECT u.Id
    FROM users u
    ORDER BY u.Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

WITH top_user AS (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
user_posts AS (
    SELECT p.Id, p.Score
    FROM posts p
    JOIN top_user tu ON p.OwnerUserId = tu.Id
)
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS percentage_above_50
FROM user_posts;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_high_score_posts
FROM posts p
WHERE p.OwnerUserId = (
    SELECT u.Id
    FROM users u
    ORDER BY u.Reputation DESC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT 
    u.DisplayName AS MostInfluentialUser,
    COUNT(p.Id) AS TotalPosts,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HighScorePosts,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.Score > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(p.Id)) AS PercentageHighScore
FROM posts p
JOIN users u 
    ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Id = (
    SELECT Id 
    FROM users 
    ORDER BY Reputation DESC 
    LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY u.DisplayName;

    FROM cards

SELECT 
    100.0 * (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.uuid)
        FROM cards c
        JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
        WHERE (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*')
          AND fd.language = 'French'
    ) / (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.uuid)
        FROM cards c
        WHERE (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*')
    ) AS percentage_french_without_power;

SELECT 
  100.0 * COUNT(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' AND (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') THEN 1 END) 
       / COUNT(CASE WHEN (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') THEN 1 END) AS percentage_french_without_power
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd 
  ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fd.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) 
     / COUNT(*)) * 100 AS percentage_french_without_power
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd 
    ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.power IS NULL 
   OR c.power = '*';

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN fd.language = 'French' AND (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') 
        THEN c.uuid 
     END) * 100.0)
    / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') 
        THEN c.uuid 
     END) AS percentage_french_without_power
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd
    ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN fd.language = 'French' AND (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') 
        THEN c.uuid 
     END) * 100.0
     / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN (c.power IS NULL OR c.power = '*') 
        THEN c.uuid 
     END)
    ) AS percentage_french
FROM cards c
LEFT JOIN foreign_data fd 
    ON c.uuid = fd.uuid;

WITH total AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM cards
),
filtered AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
      AND isTextless = 0
)
SELECT 
    f.id,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM filtered) * 100.0 / t.total_count AS percentage
FROM filtered f
CROSS JOIN total t;

WITH story_spotlight AS (
    SELECT id, isTextless
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
),
no_text_box AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM story_spotlight
    WHERE isTextless = 0
),
counts AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM no_text_box) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage
    FROM story_spotlight
)
SELECT n.id, c.percentage
FROM no_text_box n
CROSS JOIN counts c
ORDER BY n.id;

WITH filtered AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
      AND isTextless = 0
),
total_spotlight AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
)
SELECT 
    f.id,
    (COUNT(f.id) * 100.0 / ts.total_count) AS percentage
FROM filtered f
CROSS JOIN total_spotlight ts
GROUP BY f.id, ts.total_count;

WITH story_spotlight AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
),
not_textless AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
      AND isTextless = 0
),
percent_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        (COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story_spotlight)) AS percentage
    FROM not_textless
)
SELECT nt.id, pc.percentage
FROM not_textless nt
CROSS JOIN percent_calc pc;

WITH story_spotlight AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
),
no_text_box AS (
    SELECT id
    FROM cards
    WHERE isStorySpotlight = 1
      AND isTextless = 0
)
SELECT 
    (CAST((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM no_text_box) AS REAL) / 
     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM story_spotlight) * 100) AS percentage_no_text_box,
    GROUP_CONCAT(id) AS ids_no_text_box
FROM no_text_box;

WITH banned_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        format, 
        COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
    ORDER BY banned_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    bc.format,
    c.name
FROM banned_counts bc
JOIN legalities l 
    ON l.format = bc.format
    AND l.status = 'Banned'
JOIN cards c 
    ON c.uuid = l.uuid;

SELECT l.format, c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format = (
      SELECT format
      FROM legalities
      WHERE status = 'Banned'
      GROUP BY format
      ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
      LIMIT 1
  )
ORDER BY c.name;

WITH banned_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        format,
        COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
),
max_format AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_counts
    ORDER BY banned_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    mf.format,
    c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
JOIN max_format mf ON l.format = mf.format
WHERE l.status = 'Banned';

WITH banned_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        format,
        COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
),
top_format AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_counts
    ORDER BY banned_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    l.format,
    c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
JOIN top_format tf ON l.format = tf.format
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
ORDER BY c.name;

WITH banned_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        format,
        COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
),
max_banned AS (
    SELECT MAX(banned_count) AS max_count
    FROM banned_counts
),
top_formats AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_counts
    WHERE banned_count = (SELECT max_count FROM max_banned)
)
SELECT 
    l.format,
    c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format IN (SELECT format FROM top_formats)
ORDER BY l.format, c.name;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) AS avg_single_bonds_per_carcinogenic_molecule
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(b.bond_id) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label = '+'
      AND b.bond_type = '-'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS sub;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) AS avg_single_bonds
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b 
      ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label = '+'
      AND b.bond_type = '-'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS per_molecule;

SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) AS avg_single_bonds_per_carcinogenic_molecule
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b 
        ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label = '+' 
      AND b.bond_type = '-'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS sub;

    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS single_bond_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label = '+'

    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id

) AS sub;

JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = '='
);

FROM atom a

    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = '='
);

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id,
           COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
      AND b.bond_type = '-'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) AS sub;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b 
      ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    JOIN atom a 
      ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = '-'
      AND LOWER(a.element) = 'o'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) sub;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE a.element = 'o'
      AND m.molecule_id IN (
          SELECT molecule_id
          FROM bond
          GROUP BY molecule_id
          HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) = 1
             AND MIN(bond_type) = '-'
      )
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
) sub;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT a.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element = 'o'
      AND a.molecule_id IN (
          SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id
          FROM bond b
          WHERE b.bond_type = '-'
      )
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
) AS sub;

SELECT AVG(oxygen_count) AS avg_oxygen_atoms
FROM (
    SELECT a.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS oxygen_count
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element = 'O'
      AND a.molecule_id IN (
          SELECT molecule_id
          FROM bond
          GROUP BY molecule_id
          HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) = 1
             AND MAX(bond_type) = '-'
      )
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
) AS oxygen_counts;

218:
SELECT 
    ( 
      (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS FLOAT) 
       - CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.element = 'f' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS FLOAT)
      )
      / CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS FLOAT)
    ) * 100 AS percentage_no_fluorine
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a 
  ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = '+';

WITH carcinogenic AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label = '+'
),
fluorine_molecules AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id
    FROM atom a
    JOIN carcinogenic c ON a.molecule_id = c.molecule_id
    WHERE LOWER(a.element) = 'f'
)
SELECT 
    (CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT c.molecule_id) AS FLOAT) * 100 / 
     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM carcinogenic)) AS percentage_without_fluorine
FROM carcinogenic c
LEFT JOIN fluorine_molecules f ON c.molecule_id = f.molecule_id
WHERE f.molecule_id IS NULL;

SELECT 
    (COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) * 100.0 / t.total_count) AS percentage_without_fluorine
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a 
    ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id 
    AND LOWER(a.element) = 'f'
JOIN (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) AS total_count
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label = '+'
) t
WHERE m.label = '+'
  AND a.atom_id IS NULL;

SELECT 
  (COUNT(DISTINCT m_no_f.molecule_id) * 100.0 / total.total_count) AS percentage_without_fluorine
FROM 
  (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) AS total_count
    FROM molecule
    WHERE label = '+'
  ) AS total
JOIN 
  (
    SELECT m.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m
    WHERE m.label = '+'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM atom a
        WHERE a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
          AND LOWER(a.element) = 'f'
      )
  ) AS m_no_f

SELECT 
    ( (total_carc - fluor_carc) * 100.0 / total_carc ) AS percentage_without_fluorine
FROM
    (
        SELECT 
            COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) AS total_carc
        FROM molecule
        WHERE label = '+'
    ) AS total
JOIN
    (
        SELECT 
            COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS fluor_carc
        FROM molecule m
        JOIN atom a 
            ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        WHERE m.label = '+'
          AND a.element = 'f'
    ) AS fluor
;

FROM atom a
JOIN connected c 
  ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN bond b 
  ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '-'
  AND a.element IN ('i', 's');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c 
  ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id 
   OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN bond b 
  ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '-'
  AND a.element IN ('i', 's');

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
FROM atom a
WHERE a.element IN ('i', 's')
  AND a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM bond
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
  );

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT atom_id) AS atom_count
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id
    FROM bond b
    JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
    JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = '-' AND a.element IN ('i', 's')
    UNION
    SELECT a.atom_id
    FROM bond b
    JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
    JOIN atom a ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    WHERE b.bond_type = '-' AND a.element IN ('i', 's')

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) sub;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS bond_counts;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS sub;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) AS sub;

SELECT AVG(bond_count) AS avg_bonds_per_iodine_atom
FROM (
    SELECT a.atom_id, COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM atom a
    JOIN connected c 
      ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id 
      OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
    WHERE a.element = 'i'
    GROUP BY a.atom_id
) sub;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '='
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(b.bond_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label = '+' AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '='
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.molecule_id,
       m.label,
       COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '='
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN (
    SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = '='
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS top_molecule
ON m.molecule_id = top_molecule.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_carcinogenic
FROM molecule m
JOIN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = '='
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
    LIMIT 1
) top_molecule ON m.molecule_id = top_molecule.molecule_id;

  AND (CAST(s."NumGE1500" AS REAL) / s."NumTstTakr") > 0.3

SELECT 
    "School Name",
    ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" * 1.0 / "Enrollment (K-12)") * 100 AS eligible_free_rate_percentage
FROM frpm
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 2 OFFSET 9;

WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT
        CDSCode,
        "School Name" AS school_name,
        "Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12,
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS free_meal_k12,
        ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)") AS eligible_free_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
)
SELECT
    school_name,
    enrollment_k12,
    free_meal_k12,
    eligible_free_rate
FROM ranked
WHERE rn IN (10, 11);

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        "School Name",
        "Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12,
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS free_meal_k12,
        ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" * 1.0 / "Enrollment (K-12)") AS eligible_free_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rank
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    "School Name",
    enrollment_k12,
    free_meal_k12,
    eligible_free_rate
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rank IN (10, 11);

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT
        "School Name",
        "Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12,
        "Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS free_meal_k12,
        ("Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)") AS eligible_free_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm
    WHERE "Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    "School Name",
    enrollment_k12,
    free_meal_k12,
    eligible_free_rate

WITH ranked_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        f.CDSCode,
        s.School AS SchoolName,
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" AS enrollment_k12,
        f."Free Meal Count (K-12)" AS free_meal_k12,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY f."Enrollment (K-12)" DESC) AS rn
    FROM frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE f."Enrollment (K-12)" > 0
)
SELECT 
    SchoolName,
    free_meal_k12 / enrollment_k12 AS eligible_free_rate
FROM ranked_schools
WHERE rn IN (10, 11);

SELECT
    s.School,
    s.County,
    sc.AvgScrRead
FROM (
    SELECT
        sch.School,
        sch.County,
        sat.AvgScrRead,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sch.County ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead DESC) AS county_rank
    FROM schools sch
    JOIN satscores sat
        ON sch.CDSCode = sat.cds
    WHERE sch.Virtual = 'F'
) AS s
WHERE county_rank <= 5
ORDER BY s.County, county_rank;

SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.County,
    sc.AvgScrRead
FROM (
    SELECT 
        sch.School,
        sch.County,
        sat.AvgScrRead,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sch.County ORDER BY sat.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM schools sch
    JOIN satscores sat
        ON sch.CDSCode = sat.cds
    WHERE sch.Virtual = 'F'
) AS sc
WHERE sc.rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY sc.County, sc.rank_in_county;

SELECT
    s.School,
    s.County,
    ss.AvgScrRead
FROM (
    SELECT
        ss.cds,
        ss.sname,
        ss.cname,
        ss.AvgScrRead,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ss.cname
            ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM satscores ss
    JOIN schools s
        ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
) ranked
JOIN schools s
    ON ranked.cds = s.CDSCode
JOIN satscores ss
    ON ranked.cds = ss.cds
WHERE ranked.rn <= 5
ORDER BY s.County, ss.AvgScrRead DESC;

SELECT School, County, AvgScrRead
FROM (
    SELECT 
        sc.School,
        sc.County,
        ss.AvgScrRead,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY sc.County ORDER BY ss.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rank_in_county
    FROM schools sc
    JOIN satscores ss
        ON sc.CDSCode = ss.cds
    WHERE sc.Virtual = 'F'
) ranked
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY County, AvgScrRead DESC;

WITH ranked_virtual_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School,
        s.County,
        sc.AvgScrRead,
        RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY s.County 
            ORDER BY sc.AvgScrRead DESC
        ) AS rank_in_county
    FROM schools s
    JOIN satscores sc
        ON s.CDSCode = sc.cds
    WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
      AND sc.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    School,
    County,
    AvgScrRead
FROM ranked_virtual_schools
WHERE rank_in_county <= 5
ORDER BY County, rank_in_county;

    CASE 
        WHEN "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" > 0 
        THEN ROUND(("FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL

SELECT AdmEmail1, AdmEmail2, AdmEmail3
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
  AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND (SOC = '62' OR DOC = '54')
  AND (
      (AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail1 LIKE '%@%') OR
      (AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail2 LIKE '%@%') OR
      (AdmEmail3 IS NOT NULL AND AdmEmail3 LIKE '%@%')
  );

SELECT AdmEmail1 AS AdminEmail
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
  AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND SOC = '62'
  AND DOC = '54'
  AND AdmEmail1 IS NOT NULL
  AND AdmEmail1 <> ''
UNION
SELECT AdmEmail2 AS AdminEmail
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
  AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND SOC = '62'
  AND DOC = '54'
  AND AdmEmail2 IS NOT NULL
  AND AdmEmail2 <> ''
UNION
SELECT AdmEmail3 AS AdminEmail
FROM schools
WHERE County = 'San Bernardino'
  AND District = 'San Bernardino City Unified'
  AND OpenDate BETWEEN '2009-01-01' AND '2010-12-31'
  AND SOC = '62'
  AND DOC = '54'
  AND AdmEmail3 IS NOT NULL
  AND AdmEmail3 <> '';

-- Count of magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types
SELECT COUNT(*) AS magnet_k8_multiple_provision_count
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
  AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types';

-- Number of cities with K-8 schools and count of such schools per city
SELECT s.City,
       COUNT(*) AS k8_school_count
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
GROUP BY s.City
ORDER BY k8_school_count DESC;

-- Query 1: Count of magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_schools_multiple_provision
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND s.GSserved = 'K-8'
  AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types';

-- Query 2: Number of cities with K-8 schools and count of such schools per city
SELECT s.City, COUNT(*) AS num_k8_schools
FROM schools s
WHERE s.GSserved = 'K-8'
GROUP BY s.City
ORDER BY num_k8_schools DESC;

-- 1. Total number of K–8 magnet schools with Multiple Provision Types
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_multiple_provision_k8_magnet_schools
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
  AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types';

-- 2. Number of cities with K–8 magnet schools and how many such schools per city
SELECT s.City,
       COUNT(*) AS k8_magnet_school_count
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
GROUP BY s.City
ORDER BY k8_magnet_school_count DESC;

-- 1. Count of magnet K-8 schools with Multiple Provision Types
SELECT COUNT(*) AS magnet_k8_multiple_provision_count
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
  AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types';

-- 2. Number of cities with K-8 schools and count per city
SELECT s.City,
       COUNT(*) AS k8_school_count
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
GROUP BY s.City
ORDER BY k8_school_count DESC;

-- 3. Total number of distinct cities with K-8 schools
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.City) AS total_cities_with_k8
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8';

-- Part 1: Count of K-8 magnet schools with Multiple Provision Types
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT f.CDSCode) AS num_schools_multiple_provision
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
  AND f."NSLP Provision Status" = 'Multiple Provision Types';

-- Part 2: Number of cities with K-8 magnet schools and count per city
SELECT s.City,
       COUNT(DISTINCT f.CDSCode) AS num_schools
FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.Magnet = 1
  AND f."Low Grade" = 'K'
  AND f."High Grade" = '8'
GROUP BY s.City
ORDER BY num_schools DESC;

      SELECT MAX(l2.amount)
      FROM account a2
      JOIN loan l2 ON a2.account_id = l2.account_id
      WHERE l2.duration > 12
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a2.date) = 1993
  );

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, c.district_id, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
lowest_salary_oldest AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM oldest_females
    WHERE A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM oldest_females)
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) AS salary_gap
FROM lowest_salary_oldest lso
JOIN disp dp ON lso.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id;

WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, c.gender, c.district_id, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
lowest_salary_females AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM oldest_females
    WHERE A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM oldest_females)
),
salary_stats AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS min_salary, MAX(A11) AS max_salary
    FROM female_clients
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       ss.max_salary - ss.min_salary AS salary_gap
FROM lowest_salary_females lf
JOIN disp dp ON lf.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN salary_stats ss ON 1=1;

WITH oldest_females AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id, c.birth_date
    FROM client c
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) 
                          FROM client 
                          WHERE gender = 'F')
),
lowest_salary_females AS (
    SELECT of.client_id, of.district_id, d.A11 AS avg_salary
    FROM oldest_females of
    JOIN district d ON of.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE d.A11 = (
        SELECT MIN(d2.A11)
        FROM oldest_females of2
        JOIN district d2 ON of2.district_id = d2.district_id
    )
),
salary_gap AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.A11) - MIN(d.A11) AS gap
    FROM district d
    WHERE d.A11 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT a.account_id, sg.gap
FROM lowest_salary_females lsf
JOIN disp dp ON lsf.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
CROSS JOIN salary_gap sg;

WITH female_birth_min AS (
    SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS min_birth_date
    FROM client
    WHERE gender = 'F'
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, c.district_id, d.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
      AND c.birth_date = (SELECT min_birth_date FROM female_birth_min)
),
lowest_salary_oldest AS (
    SELECT MIN(A11) AS min_avg_salary
    FROM oldest_females
),
female_max_salary AS (
    SELECT MAX(d.A11) AS max_avg_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT max_avg_salary FROM female_max_salary) - (SELECT min_avg_salary FROM lowest_salary_oldest) AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_females ofe
JOIN lowest_salary_oldest lso ON ofe.A11 = lso.min_avg_salary
JOIN disp dp ON dp.client_id = ofe.client_id
JOIN account a ON a.account_id = dp.account_id;

SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district) AS salary_gap
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date = (
      SELECT MIN(birth_date)
      FROM client
      WHERE gender = 'F'
  )
  AND dist.A11 = (
      SELECT MIN(d2.A11)
      FROM client c2
      JOIN district d2 ON c2.district_id = d2.district_id
      WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
        AND c2.birth_date = (
            SELECT MIN(birth_date)
            FROM client
            WHERE gender = 'F'
        )
  );

116:
SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) -
      MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END))
     / MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END) * 100
    ) AS increase_rate
FROM trans t
WHERE t.account_id = (
    SELECT l.account_id
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

WITH first_client AS (
    SELECT l.account_id
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.loan_id
    LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_1998,
        MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END) AS balance_1993
    FROM trans t
    JOIN first_client fc ON t.account_id = fc.account_id
)
SELECT 
    ((balance_1998 - balance_1993) * 1.0 / balance_1993) * 100 AS increase_rate_percent
FROM balances;

WITH first_loan_client AS (
    SELECT d.client_id
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    WHERE l.date = DATE '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.date ASC, l.loan_id ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
    SELECT 
        t.date,
        t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN disp d ON t.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN first_loan_client flc ON d.client_id = flc.client_id
    WHERE t.date IN (DATE '1993-03-22', DATE '1998-12-27')
)
SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN date = DATE '1998-12-27' THEN balance END) -
      MAX(CASE WHEN date = DATE '1993-03-22' THEN balance END))
     / MAX(CASE WHEN date = DATE '1993-03-22' THEN balance END) * 100
    ) AS increase_rate_percentage
FROM balances;

SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1998-12-27' THEN t.balance END) -
      MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END))
     / MAX(CASE WHEN t.date = '1993-03-22' THEN t.balance END) * 100
    ) AS increase_rate
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE a.account_id = (
    SELECT l.account_id
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
AND t.date IN ('1993-03-22', '1998-12-27');

WITH first_loan_account AS (
    SELECT a.account_id
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
    ORDER BY l.loan_id ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
    SELECT 
        t.date,
        t.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN first_loan_account fla ON t.account_id = fla.account_id
    WHERE t.date IN ('1993-03-22', '1998-12-27')
)
SELECT 
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN date = '1998-12-27' THEN balance END) -
      MAX(CASE WHEN date = '1993-03-22' THEN balance END)
     ) / 
     MAX(CASE WHEN date = '1993-03-22' THEN balance END)
    ) * 100 AS increase_rate_percentage
FROM balances;

  AND type = 'debit'

    SUM(amount) AS total_debited
FROM trans
WHERE account_id = 3
  AND type = 'debit'  -- Replace with actual value representing a debit transaction
GROUP BY k_symbol

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1997' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) -
      SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)
    ) * 100.0 / 
      SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', loan.date) = '1996' THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)
    ) AS growth_rate
FROM loan
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M';

WITH yearly_loans AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) AS loan_year,
        SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) IN (1996, 1997)
    GROUP BY loan_year
)
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1997 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) -
      SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1996 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END))
     / SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1996 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END)
    ) * 100 AS growth_rate_percentage
FROM yearly_loans;

SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) -
      SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END))
     / SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)
    ) * 100 AS growth_rate_percentage
FROM loan l
JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.gender = 'M';

WITH loan_totals AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1996,
        SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_1997
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
)
SELECT
    CASE 
        WHEN total_1996 = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ((total_1997 - total_1996) / total_1996) * 100
    END AS growth_rate_percent
FROM loan_totals;

WITH loan_sums AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) AS loan_year,
        SUM(l.amount) AS total_amount
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
    JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'M'
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date) IN (1996, 1997)
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.date)
)
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1997 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1996 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END))
     / SUM(CASE WHEN loan_year = 1996 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) * 100
    ) AS growth_rate_percentage
FROM loan_sums;

SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_running_contract_amount
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT l.loan_id, l.amount
    FROM loan l
    JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
    WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
      AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
) sub;

SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_running_contract_amount
FROM loan l
WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = l.account_id
      AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
  );

SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_running_contract_amount
FROM loan l
WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND l.account_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.account_id
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
  );

SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_running_contract_amount
FROM loan l
JOIN trans t
  ON l.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(l.amount) AS avg_running_loan_amount
FROM loan l
WHERE l.status IN ('C', 'D')
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM trans t
    WHERE t.account_id = l.account_id
      AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
  );

SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN district d
    ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
  AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT DISTINCT
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN district d
    ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN trans t
    ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM a.date) = 1993
  AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT 
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    a.date >= '1993-01-01'
    AND a.date < '1994-01-01'
    AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT 
    a.account_id, 
    d.A2 AS district_name, 
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'
    AND a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT DISTINCT 
    a.account_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A3 AS district_region
FROM account a
JOIN district d 
    ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN trans t 
    ON a.account_id = t.account_id
WHERE a.date BETWEEN '1993-01-01' AND '1993-12-31'
  AND t.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM card ca
JOIN disp d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, c.birth_date)) AS age
FROM card ca
JOIN disp d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURRENT_DATE) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURDATE()) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) - YEAR(c.birth_date) AS age
FROM card ca
JOIN disp d ON ca.disp_id = d.disp_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold'
  AND d.type = 'OWNER';

    c.client_id,
    a.account_id,
    a.frequency
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE d.type = 'OWNER'
  AND dist.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
  AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31';

JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id

WHERE dist.A2 = 'east Bohemia'
  AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
